h1: Custom Food Gifts for Clients and Employees
metaDescription: Send branded custom food gifts to clients or employees. Choose from charcuterie boxes, cheese samplers, and more with personalized cutting boards.
introHtml:
Marketing directors and HR managers often struggle to find gifts that feel personal and memorable without breaking the budget. Custom food gifts solve that problem. They are universally appreciated, easy to ship, and can be branded with your logo or message. Whether you are thanking a client or rewarding a team, a gourmet food box creates a positive association with your company.

Perfect Imprints offers a curated selection of food gifts from Cheese Bros., including charcuterie boxes, cheese samplers, and seasonal advent calendars. Many options come with a customized cutting board that features your company name or logo. Products like the Cheese Bros. Try It, Love It Food Gift Box or the Deluxe Taste of Wisconsin Food Gift Box combine premium ingredients with practical branding that recipients will reuse.

Orders are produced quickly with standard lead times of 5-10 business days, and minimum order quantities start at 10 units. Each gift box is packaged securely for direct shipping to multiple addresses. This makes custom food gifts ideal for holiday campaigns, employee appreciation, or client retention programs.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom food gifts?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product but typically start at 10 units. Some items may have higher minimums. Contact our sales team for specific product MOQs.

faqs.q: Can I have my logo printed on the cutting board?
faqs.a: Yes. Many food gift boxes include a customized cutting board. Your logo or message can be laser engraved or printed on the board. Proofs are provided before production.

faqs.q: What is the production lead time for food gifts?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 5-10 business days after approval of artwork. Rush orders may be available for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on the destination.

faqs.q: Can you ship directly to multiple recipients?
faqs.a: Yes. We can drop-ship individual orders to different addresses. You provide the recipient list, and we handle the packing and shipping. This is ideal for corporate gifting campaigns.

faqs.q: Are there vegetarian or dietary restriction options?
faqs.a: Some food gift boxes contain meat and cheese. Vegetarian options may be available. Please check product descriptions or contact us for specific dietary needs.

heroAltText: Custom food gift box with charcuterie, cheese, and a branded cutting board for corporate gifting
